parameters.query: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url FROM public.global_settings WHERE key = 'n8n_base_url';

WITH directory AS (
  SELECT trim(concat_ws(' ', rm."First name", rm."Last name")) AS name,
         NULLIF(trim(rm."Email address"), '') AS email
  FROM public.raw_members rm
  WHERE COALESCE(rm.is_current, true) = true
  UNION
  SELECT trim(concat_ws(' ', rc."First name", rc."Last name")) AS name,
         NULLIF(trim(rc."Email address"), '') AS email
  FROM public.raw_contacts rc
  WHERE COALESCE(rc.is_current, true) = true
), membership_categories AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT trim(category) AS membership
  FROM public.membership_packages
  WHERE COALESCE(trim(category), '') <> ''
)
SELECT 'person' AS row_type, name, email, NULL::text AS membership
FROM directory
WHERE COALESCE(name, '') <> ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 'membership' AS row_type, NULL::text AS name, NULL::text AS email, membership
FROM membership_categories
ORDER BY row_type, name NULLS LAST, email NULLS LAST, membership NULLS LAST
LIMIT 2000;
